author: Matthew R. Scott
description: TypeScript types, schema validation, .petrinet compilation, and structural operations for Velocitron nets.
name: @velocitron/core

scripts.build: node tools/generate-schemas.mjs && node tools/generate-ir-schema.mjs && tsc -b tsconfig.build.json --clean && tsc -b tsconfig.build.json && node tools/audit-package-import.mjs
scripts.check:generated: python3 ../../tools/antlr.py check-typescript && node tools/generate-schemas.mjs --check && node tools/generate-ir-schema.mjs --check
scripts.generate: python3 ../../tools/antlr.py generate-typescript && node tools/generate-schemas.mjs && node tools/generate-ir-schema.mjs
